column2: TS_Nearly_579,YOU,TS,LINE,"<> If a city cleric comes up to someone and asks them for their political opinion, it would take a very special kind of person to not just say what the cleric wants to hear."" #Nearly #LOC_579",,,,,,,,
column3: TS_Nearly_579,YOU,TS,LINE,"<> Si un clerc de la cité approche quelqu'un et lui demande son opinion politique, il faudrait une personne très spéciale pour ne pas juste dire ce que le clerc veut entendre."" #Nearly #LOC_579",,,,,,,,
